title: kopsia harmandiana
intro: Kopsia harmandiana, also known as the Harmand's kopsia or Vietnamese kopsia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kopsia harmandiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
